anemia.confusion_or_new_neurologic_defic.wording: 새로운 혼란·의식저하, 한쪽 마비·말하기 어려움 또는 걷기 힘든 심한 균형 문제가 있나요?

anemia.current_symptom_priority.wording: 현재 가장 불편하거나 의료진에게 우선 확인받고 싶은 증상은 무엇인가요?

anemia.dietary_iron_b12_folate_intake.wording: 육류·생선·달걀·콩·채소 등 철분·B12·엽산 공급 식품과 제한식·채식 여부를 알려주세요.

anemia.exertional_dyspnea_palpitations_a.wording: 걷기·계단에서 숨참·두근거림·어지럼이 생기는 정도와 이전 대비 변화를 알려주세요.

anemia.known_critical_or_rapidly_falling.wording: 의료기관에서 혈색소가 매우 낮거나 빠르게 떨어져 즉시 평가가 필요하다고 안내받았나요?

anemia.onset_duration_and_course.wording: 증상 또는 검사 이상을 처음 안 시기, 지속 기간과 악화·호전·반복 경과를 알려주세요.

anemia.oral_iron_regimen_adherence_and_t.wording: 경구 철분 제품·원소철 용량·복용 간격, 빠뜨린 횟수와 변비·복통·메스꺼움 등 부작용을 알려주세요.

anemia.other_detail_or_patient_priority.wording: 질문에 없지만 의료진에게 꼭 전달하고 싶은 내용이나 가장 걱정되는 점을 알려주세요.

anemia.pallor_cold_hands_and_orthostasis.wording: 창백함·손발 차가움, 일어설 때 어지럼 또는 맥박이 빨라지는 느낌이 있나요?

anemia.past_anemia_transfusion_and_blood.wording: 과거 빈혈 유형·치료·수혈, 혈액질환 또는 비슷한 재발 병력을 알려주세요.

anemia.pica_restless_legs_and_nail_hair_.wording: 얼음·흙 등을 먹고 싶은 느낌, 하지불안, 손발톱·탈모·혀 통증 변화가 있나요?

anemia.pregnancy_or_postpartum_bleeding.wording: 임신 중이거나 출산·유산 후인데 많은 출혈, 심한 복통, 어지럼·실신이 있나요?

anemia.pregnancy_postpartum_and_lactatio.wording: 현재 임신·수유 여부, 임신 주수 또는 출산·유산 시기와 출혈량을 알려주세요.

anemia.primary_group.wording: 이번 방문은 빈혈 의심 증상, 혈액검사상 빈혈, 철결핍빈혈, 비타민 B12·엽산 관련 빈혈, 만성질환·신장질환 관련 빈혈, 출혈 관련 빈혈, 치료 후 추적 중 무엇에 가깝나요?

anemia.renal_dialysis_and_esa_history.wording: 신장기능·투석 상태와 조혈자극제 투여 여부·일정을 알려주세요.

anemia.transfusion_reaction_pattern.wording: 수혈 중이거나 직후에 숨참·흉통·고열·오한·허리통증·붉거나 짙은 소변이 생겼나요?

anemia.treatment_response_and_followup_l.wording: 치료 후 증상과 혈색소·페리틴이 얼마나 변했고 언제 재검할 예정인가요?

anemia.unexplained_bleeding_bruising_and.wording: 원인 모를 멍·점상출혈·코피·잇몸출혈과 함께 지속 발열·반복 감염·심한 피로 중 하나가 있나요?

anemia.urinary_nasal_dental_and_other_bl.wording: 혈뇨·코피·잇몸출혈·멍, 상처 후 오래가는 출혈이 있나요?

anemia.white_cells_platelets_and_other_c.wording: 백혈구·호중구·혈소판 이상도 함께 있었나요? 결과와 추세를 알려주세요.

guideline_behavior.rationale: Interview behavior derived from guidelines may change with recommendations.

local_jurisdiction.rationale: Local pathways and administrative rules may change quickly.

safety_critical.rationale: Safety behavior and escalation knowledge require frequent monitoring.

stable_semantic.rationale: Atomic patient-reportable concepts are relatively stable but still require periodic review.

terminology_mapping.rationale: Terminology and interoperability baselines have independent releases.

clinical_guideline.rationale: Daily automated monitoring provides early detection for high-impact guideline changes; full review occurs only when change is detected or the review date is reached.

interoperability_standard.rationale: Versioned interoperability standards and domain datasets are monitored weekly; detected changes trigger mapping and Coverage review without changing clinical rules.

nice_guidance.rationale: NICE guidance is versioned and may be amended; weekly monitoring detects changes without implying weekly clinical re-review.

public_health_guidance.rationale: Public-health pages can change between formal releases; weekly monitoring is appropriate for the research package.

terminology_server.rationale: Terminology servers publish versioned content; monthly baseline monitoring balances stability and acquisition cost.

assertions: History should seek overt blood loss including menstruation and epistaxis, blood donation, inadequate diet, NSAID use and previous gastrointestinal resection or bypass.
Evaluation and treatment response require iron studies, coeliac and gastrointestinal context, medication and follow-up information; this package does not diagnose the cause.
artifacts.title: Guidelines for management of iron deficiency anaemia in adults

assertions: Iron-deficiency anaemia and selected age or symptom combinations require FIT or referral consideration; pallor, persistent fatigue, fever, infection, bruising, bleeding and petechiae can warrant urgent blood count assessment.
artifacts.title: Suspected cancer: anaemia-related recommendations

assertions: Ferritin is an iron-store marker whose interpretation must consider infection and inflammation; raw result, reference context and inflammatory markers should be preserved.
artifacts.title: Guideline on ferritin concentrations to assess iron status

assertions: FHIR lookup confirmed active concepts for anaemia, iron-deficiency anaemia, macrocytic anaemia, B12- and folate-deficiency megaloblastic anaemia, blood-loss anaemia, chronic-disease anaemia and low haemoglobin.
MRCM supports provisional semantic binding only and does not establish cause or urgency.
artifacts.title: STOM anaemia terminology and MRCM summary
